title: LOTR: Renewed Extended
description: An Extensive mod that aims to finish Lord of the Rings: Renewed
body:
**Please note: This mod requires [The Lord of the Rings Mod: Renewed](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-lord-of-the-rings-mod-renewed) to work which you will have to download manually as it is not listed on Modrinth.**

This mod is a Minecraft Forge 1.16 addon (currently in beta) for Mevan's The Lord of the Rings Mod: Renewed mod. The mod is currently in active development by a small team with the goal of adding all the missing content from LOTR: Legacy back into LOTR: Renewed. You will need to install The Lord of the Rings Mod: Renewed mod in order to run it.

## Current Features:
- Structures & NPCs for the Shire, Bree-land, Rangers of the North, Gundabad, Blue Mountains, Lindon, Rivendell, Eregion, and Barrow Downs
- NPC Trading has been implemented with over 35 traders ported or added.
- Most items/blocks/weapons and armor have been ported
- Most ported items/blocks have new renewed textures that fit 1.16.5 Minecraft's style
- Tree types such as Chestnut, Banana, Willow, and Ebony have been added
- Fellowships, Banner Protection, Traders, Hired Units and a LOTR Mod Settings Menu
- The legacy modifier system has been completely ported, including new modifiers
- The hired unit system has been re-implemented
- Some new blocks/items such as new furs, new drystones and new lanterns

Very out-of-date Google Spreadsheet [here](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/u/4/d/e/2PACX-1vRYhrbf1EEjnaGkdid5MLnrnhlPH_QZ0WltGYX5GGixfgX4QdkGvVv2uDyV64mJ29qsYTBf4JRFy0FO/pubhtml).

 
To stay up-to-date, get support, or to discuss the mod, join out [discord](https://discord.gg/eu7xCnpQAS).

## License & Modpacks
You are allowed to use this mod in modpacks as long as your Modpack uses the Curseforge modpack system or you get permission from the team.

_"Credits to Mevans for LOTR: Legacy/Renewed, and Gruk texture inspirations"_

This mod is (C) copyright by Maximustheminer and the Renewed Extended Team. You are not permitted to redistribute this mod without written permission of the team. Curseforge.com, Modrinth.com, and the Discord Server are the only locations allowed to distribute the mod.
